titleStmt.title: SII 20.231: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 231. (B.K. No. 127 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Three faces of a pillar in the temple of Madhukēśvara.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1[3]09, Prabhava, Mārga[śira], lunar eclipse, Monday. The tithi which is lost was apparently Pūrṇimā. The details correspond to A.D. 1387, November 25, Monday. There was a lunar eclipse on that day.
The inscription seems to record a gift of land to some deity, whose name is lost. The donor of the grant, whose name also is lost, seems to have been the governor of Gōve.
The king is stated to be ruling from Hastināpuri. The writing on the second and third faces has been erased.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraḥścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdha rājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara turuṣkarāyaśiraḥkaṁdukakrīḍāvinōda magadharā
yamānamadamarddana Aṁdhrarāyagaṁdhasiṁdhurapaṁcānana māḷava
rāyakāḷōragajāḷavainatēya barbbararāyakīcakadurbbalīkara
ṇakāṁtēya haṁmīrarāyāṁdhakāranirmmūlanagharmmakiraṇa
gūrjararāyabhūrjapādasphūrjitakaṭhārakuṭhāra cōḷarāya
hēḷāpaharaṇabhāḷalōcana cērarāyavīrakuṁjarakaṁṭhīra
va kharppararāyasarpparājadarpōccāṭanaśakuṁtādhipa nēpāḷarā
yakāmakōpāgninētra catussamudrāṁkitanijaśāsanapākaśāsana
pramukhadigdēvatāmadhyamalōkapāla śrīmadbukkarājadharādhināthata
nūbhava svakaravinihitaśārdūlamrugamrugayāvinōdana śrīvīra
hariharēśvara hastināpuriyalli sukhasaṁkādhāvinōdadiṁ pruthvīrā
jyaṁgeyuttiralu . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . śrī madgaurīkucakalaśa
kuṁkumāṁkitalasitavakṣasthalacaraṇasarasīruhalōluṁbamā
namattamadhukara śaivāgamavārddhivarddhiṣṇusudhākara svāmikāryya
dhuraṁdharāṁjanēya duramātyadurnayaduḥśāsananiśēṣīkruta
bhīmasēna Apratihataśaktidhara Atarkkitapratāpa rugyajuḥsāmātharvva
vēdavēdāṁgakauśalapaścimapārāvāra kalitagōvānagara virājamā
narucirasiṁhāsana kuṁtalaviṣayaramyamāna gōmaṁtaśikharisaṁni
vēśa vanavāsipramukhadvādaśasahasrajanapadōpētarājyagiriśikharasiṁ
hakiśōra

pādapadmārādhaka śrī
duṣṭanigra
haśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁdāḷuttire śakavarṣa 1309 neya prabhava
saṁvatsarada mārga sōmōparāga pasōmavāra saṁkramaṇa vi
tipāta kūḍida puṇyakāladalu . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ
erased
kuṁ�ḷadē
śada banavaseya paṁnidāsi nāḍoḷagaṇa
erased
hebbaḷḷiya sōmagau
ḍa yalliya
gauḍa samastanāḍu
Akṣiṇi

Āgāmi sidha sādhya Aṣṭabhōgatē
svasti samastapraśastasahitaṁ
yajanayājana ĀdhyayanaAdhyāpana yamaniyama
worn out
vāmātya
dakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍa mādhavāmātyacaraṇasarasijabhramarabhramarāya
māna kāmāṁbikā śrīhariha
radēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka śaraṇāgata
damaged
sarvamānyavāgi
worn out
pileya brāhmarugaḷanu
sahasra svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ nā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭivarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ . śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
